judgeReasoning: The script calls convertAllMdx first to generate the markdown mirrors under public/docs/, then calls generateLlmsTxt and generateLLMFullContextFiles (passing product and nav from docs.config.ts), and finally generates the search index via generateDocsSearchFiles.
